scripts.sync-version: npm run sync-version-elements && npm run sync-version-elements-react
scripts.sync-version-elements: VERSION=$(grep '^conekta.version=' gradle.properties | cut -d'=' -f2) && cd webApp/packages/elements && npm --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version version "$VERSION"
scripts.sync-version-elements-react: VERSION=$(grep '^conekta.version=' gradle.properties | cut -d'=' -f2) && cd webApp/packages/elements-react && npm --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version version "$VERSION"
